title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Clear, detailed answers about our labs, certificates, and enterprise options.
searchPlaceholder: Search by keyword (e.g. labs, billing, AWS)...

supportCard.title: Need custom training?
supportCard.description: Get in touch with our curriculum team to design bespoke learning paths for your team.

items.question: Are these courses strictly theoretical, or do they include live labs?
items.answer: Every core engineering track includes browser-integrated sandbox environments. You will run commands, configure pipelines, and troubleshoot errors on real cloud instances (AWS, GCP) or in Kubernetes environments directly inside your browser window.

items.question: Who designs the course curriculum?
items.answer: Our paths are created by active principal consultants and architects at Xebia. These are the same engineers who architect solutions for global banks, e-commerce giants, and scale-ups, meaning you learn real production patterns.

items.question: How do the cloud sandbox environments work? Do I need my own accounts?
items.answer: No personal accounts or credentials are required. Xebia Learn dynamically provisions temporary, fully funded cloud instances or isolated namespaces for you. The platform manages the credentials, and resources are cleaned up automatically when your lab session ends.

items.question: Do you offer team billing or custom learning paths for companies?
items.answer: Yes. We provide enterprise-grade solutions including Single Sign-On (SSO), team analytics dashboards, customizable learning paths, and private office hours with Xebia consultants. Get in touch via our Contact page for details.

items.question: Are the courses self-paced, and is there a time limit?
items.answer: Yes. All digital courses are 100% self-paced. Once enrolled, you have unlimited access to the course materials, slides, and syllabus updates, so you can learn on whatever schedule fits your workday.
